channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Isuzu urges government to extend electricity tariff relief to support South Africa's steel and automotive industries
item.description: Isuzu South Africa has urged government to consider extending electricity tariff relief to the domestic steel industry, arguing that lower energy costs would improve the competitiveness of locally pro...

item.title: Tevita Tatola scores first try in NRL debut at Stadium Australia
item.description: Tevita Tatola made a memorable debut in the NRL by scoring his first try at Stadium Australia, sparking joy among fans and marking a significant moment for the team. The event, which took place on Jul...

item.title: Shooting at Toronto Festival Leaves 2 Dead, Several Injured
item.description: A shooting incident at Toronto’s Salsa on St. Clair festival has resulted in two fatalities and multiple serious injuries. Toronto police confirmed the attack occurred during the event and are conduct...

item.title: Navigating the New Reality of Shark Encounters in Australian Waters
item.description: The article explores the author's experiences as a spearfisher facing increased shark encounters in Australian and New Zealand waters. It highlights the shift in marine ecosystems, with sharks becomin...

item.title: Embu Woman's Journey from Mango Sales to UAE Career
item.description: Faith Mwaniki, a woman from Embu, has transformed her life after leaving behind a job selling mangoes with her mother. A year ago, she boarded a flight to the UAE with just 40kg of luggage, hope, and ...

item.title: India's GDP Growth Slows to 5.7% in Q2, Government Implements Measures to Stimulate Economy
item.description: India's GDP growth slowed to 5.7% in the second quarter of 2026, marking a slight decline from the previous quarter's 6.1%. The government has announced a series of measures to boost economic activity...

item.title: Ferdinand Omanyala's Diamond League Standings and Commonwealth Games Prep
item.description: Ferdinand Omanyala missed the Monaco Diamond League meeting, missing an opportunity to add points for the 2026 final in Brussels. World champion Oblique Seville won the men's 100m event. The Diamond L...

item.title: Former Qatar Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani Dies at 74
item.description: The former emir of Qatar, Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, passed away at the age of 74, marking the end of an era for the small Arab state. Leading Qatar from 1995 to 2013, he transformed the count...

item.title: Thousands of Protesters in Albania Demand Transparency Over Trump-Linked Resort Project and Call for Prime Minister's Resignation
item.description: Thousands of people continued their nightly protests in Tirana, Albania, as demonstrators gathered for the 42nd straight evening to demand the resignation of Prime Minister Edi Rama and oppose a propo...

item.title: Security forces kill 67 terrorists in ongoing Operation Shaban in Balochistan
item.description: Security forces killed 67 terrorists during Operation Shaban in Balochistan, according to state broadcaster PTV News. The operation, launched after a July 7 attack on a police post in Mangi Dam area t...

item.title: Tinubu Faces Calls for Independent Inquiry into PFIPC Controversy
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu's directive to the Independent Corrupt Practices Commission (ICPC) to investigate the PFIPC controversy has sparked widespread criticism. Civil society groups and lawyers a...

item.title: Department of Justice probes Argentine Football Association corruption allegations
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice, under former President Donald Trump's administration, has launched an investigation into the Argentine Football Association (AFA) over allegations of corruption. The pr...

item.title: Two Individuals Convicted in Vehicle Fraud Case Involving Luxury Cars
item.description: Mohamed Imran (39) and Suraya Imran (37) have been convicted of fraud and uttering in the Parow Regional Court. The provincial spokesperson for the Hawks, Lieutenant Colonel Siyabulela Vukubi, reveale...

item.title: Christian Eriksen collapses during Denmark-Ukraine friendly, sparking medical emergency response
item.description: Christian Eriksen, the Danish footballer, experienced a sudden collapse during a friendly match against Ukraine, prompting an immediate medical response. The incident occurred just over five years aft...

item.title: EXO Promises Return to Filipino Fans Amid Ongoing Support
item.description: The article discusses EXO's commitment to their Filipino fanbase, emphasizing that their reunion depends on the continued support of their fans. The group, known for their global popularity in K-pop, ...

item.title: Warframe's Tau Update Introduces Noir Detective Story with Gambling and Robotic Elements
item.description: The highly anticipated Warframe Tau update, set for late 2026, is introducing a bold new narrative direction for the game. The update, showcased at TennoCon 2026, features a neo-noir detective story s...

item.title: Territorial Dispute Over Google Maps Border Controversy
item.description: In 2010, Nicaragua and Costa Rica engaged in a territorial dispute over a border area near the Río San Juan, with Nicaragua positioning troops on Isla Portillos, which Costa Rica claimed as its territ...

item.title: Tragedy in Vietnam: Overloaded vessel sinks, killing 15 Indians
item.description: A tragic incident unfolded on the coastal waters of Vietnam's Nha Trang city when a privately operated boat carrying 15 Indian tourists capsized, resulting in multiple fatalities. The overloaded vesse...

item.title: England faces Norway in World Cup quarter-final amid weather concerns
item.description: England's World Cup quarter-final against Norway is set to face potential delays due to extreme heat warnings issued by Miami authorities just hours before the match is scheduled to begin. The weather...

item.title: Tragic Car Crash on Mbagathi Road Claims Three Lives, Colleague Pays Tribute
item.description: A tragic road accident on Mbagathi Road in Nairobi left three people dead after a BMW sedan veered off the road and crashed into a footbridge, bursting into flames. The incident, which occurred early ...
